Careers

homecareers

 

As one of the leaders in high-energy-density DPPS laser design and manufacturing, Passat Ltd. offers a dynamic work environment, encouraging employees to contribute optimally and grow professionally. This unique environment exposes the willing individual to advanced concepts and techniques that are both cutting edge and at the same time mandatory for maintaining an expertise in the highly dynamic field of solid state-lasers and their applications.

 

One position currently available:

 

Laser / Optics Lab Technician

The candidate must have a good technical background. Knowledge of optics, optoelectronic technologies and applications is an asset. Basic understanding of electronic and electrical systems is needed, as well as the ability to follow strict optical and electrical safety procedures and laboratory practices.  The salary will be determined by the candidate’s experience and skills of working with precision optics and fine mechanics.
